mapper.select:
SELECT si.id ,si.s_info_code AS securityCode ,si.s_info_name AS securityShortName ,si.b_info_fullname AS fullName ,si.b_info_issuer AS issuer ,si.b_issue_amountplan AS issueAmount ,si.b_info_carrydate AS carryDate ,si.b_info_maturitydate AS maturityDate ,si.rating_security AS securityRating ,si.rating_securityissuer AS issuerRating ,si.security_type AS securityType ,dst.security_type_name AS securityTypeName ,si.date_exists AS termStr FROM sirm_securityinfo si LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = si.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0
AND si.s_info_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND si.s_info_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityShortName}, '%')
AND si.b_info_issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
ORDER BY si.id DESC

SELECT si.b_info_fullname AS fullName ,si.s_info_name AS securityShortName ,si.s_info_code AS securityCode ,si.b_info_issuer AS issuerName ,si.s_windcode_nib AS nibCode ,COALESCE(si.s_windcode_sh, si.s_windcode_sz) AS exchangeCode ,si.b_issue_amountplan AS issueAmount ,si.date_inright_exists AS remExeTerm ,si.b_info_carrydate AS carryDate ,si.b_info_maturitydate AS maturityDate ,si.b_info_pledge_ratio AS pledgeRatio ,si.rating_security_agency AS ratingAgency ,si.rating_security AS securityRating ,si.rating_securityissuer AS issuerRating ,si.rating_outlook AS ratingOutlook ,si.b_agency_grnttype AS guaranteeStatus ,si.b_agency_name AS leadUnderwriter ,si.inner_issuer_rating AS innerIssuerRating ,si.security_type AS securityType ,dst.security_type_name AS securityTypeName ,si.date_redemtion_exists AS putExeTerm ,si.date_call_exists AS callRemTerm ,si.inner_guarantor_rating AS innerGuarantorRating ,si.date_inright_exists AS optRemTerm ,si.date_exists AS termStr ,si.b_fund_usage AS fundUsage ,si.b_prompt_reason AS promptReason ,si.b_analysis AS analysis FROM sirm_securityinfo si LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = si.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.id = #{securityId}

SELECT id ,s_info_code ,s_info_name ,b_info_fullname ,b_info_issuer ,s_windcode_nib ,s_windcode_sh ,s_windcode_sz ,b_issue_amountplan ,b_issue_amountact ,b_info_couponrate ,b_info_carrydate ,b_info_maturitydate ,b_info_pledge_ratio ,rating_security_agency ,rating_security ,rating_securityissuer ,rating_outlook ,b_agency_grnttype ,guarantor ,b_agency_name ,inner_issuer_rating ,security_type ,inner_guarantor_rating ,date_exists ,date_redemtion_exists ,date_call_exists ,date_inright_exists ,b_fund_usage ,b_prompt_reason ,b_analysis FROM sirm_securityinfo WHERE id = #{securityId}

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,CASE WHEN p.parent_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(pp.pool_name, '/', p.pool_name) ELSE p.pool_name END AS poolName ,ips.pool_type ,DATE_FORMAT(ips.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ip_investment_pool pp ON pp.id = p.parent_id AND pp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 )

SELECT CASE WHEN p.parent_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(pp.pool_name, '/', p.pool_name) ELSE p.pool_name END AS poolName ,ips.pool_type ,DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ips.entry_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate ,COUNT(DISTINCT ips.security_code) AS bondCount FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN sirm_securityinfo sb ON ips.security_code = sb.s_info_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ip_investment_pool pp ON pp.id = p.parent_id AND pp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sb.b_info_issuer = ( SELECT b_info_issuer FROM sirm_securityinfo WHERE s_info_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 ) GROUP BY p.id ,p.pool_name ,p.parent_id ,pp.pool_name ,ips.pool_type

SELECT al.id ,al.security_code ,al.security_short_name ,al.security_type ,al.adjust_type ,al.adjust_mode ,al.target_pool_id ,al.target_pool_name ,al.pool_type ,al.audit_status ,al.adjuster_id ,al.adjuster_name ,al.adjust_reason ,al.adjust_advice ,al.attachment_files ,al.material_files ,al.submit_time ,al.audit_time ,al.entry_time FROM ip_adjust_log al WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY al.crte_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT target_pool_id FROM ip_pool_status WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT security_code) FROM ip_pool_status WHERE target_pool_id = #{poolId} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_adjust_log WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE( ( SELECT s.node_label FROM ip_adjust_step s WHERE s.adjust_log_id = al.id AND s.step_status = 'pending' ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC ,s.id ASC LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT s.node_label FROM ip_adjust_step s WHERE s.adjust_log_id = al.id ORDER BY s.sort_order DESC ,s.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) FROM ip_adjust_log al WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND al.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY al.submit_time DESC ,al.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND p.pool_type = 'observe' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN sirm_securityinfo si ON si.s_info_code = ips.security_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.b_info_issuer = ( SELECT b_info_issuer FROM sirm_securityinfo WHERE s_info_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND p.pool_type = 'observe' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_status SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id ,adjust_log_id ,flow_node_id ,node_code ,node_label ,node_type ,approval_strategy ,sort_order ,step_status ,handler_id ,handler_name ,process_action ,process_comment ,start_time ,process_time FROM ip_adjust_step WHERE adjust_log_id = #{adjustLogId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE is_deleted = 0
